sections.paragraph:
Original: מתכנת מתכנת

Transliteration: mathkôneth mathkûneth

Phonetic: math-ko'-neth

BDB Definition:

  1. measurement, proportion, tale
    1. tale, tally (of bricks)
    2. measurement, proportion

Origin: from H8505 in the transferred sense of measuring

TWOT entry: 2511c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
